name: China Agritech v. Resh
question: Does the American Pipe tolling rule allow a previously unnamed plaintiff to bring a subsequent class action after the applicable limitations period has passed?
description: A case in which the Court decided that upon denial of class certification, a putative class member may not, in lieu of promptly joining an existing suit or promptly filing a individual action, commence a class action anew beyond the time allowed by the applicable statute of limitations.
